name: Sprint Burst
description: When starting to run, break into a sprint at 150% of your normal running speed for 3 seconds.

name: Dead Hard
description: When injured, tap into your adrenaline bank and endure a damage.

name: Pop Goes The Weasel
description: After hooking a Survivor, the next Generator you damage instantly loses 20% of its current progression.

name: Corrupt Intervention
description: At the start of the Trial, the 3 Generators furthest from you are blocked by The Entity for 120 seconds.
